title: Stackable Potions
description: Potions, Splash Potions & Lingering Potions will now stack up to 16!
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# 🍸 Stackable Potions
- **All Potions stack to 16**, allowing them to actually be used on journeys
- **Compatible with vanilla clients**, without any disparity
